_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of Mosaicism and Detection of Cryptic Alleles in CRISPR/Cas9-Engineered Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and

_contextSnippet: However, we found several animals that had total CNV quantifications of 1. In the example shown, we were only able to amplify a single excision allele, but the animal's second allele could not be amplified by either CNV assays.
details: Successfully detected cryptic alleles by measuring copy number variance (CNV), identifying animals with total CNV quantifications of 1 instead of expected 2
